A.text: Between the two plates, the electric field lines point from plate 2 toward plate 1.

B.text: Electric field lines can cross in space.

C.text: The electric field lines around plate 2 exhibit a convergent pattern.

D.text: The electric field lines around plate 1 exhibit a divergent pattern.

parsed.answer_value: Between the two plates, the electric field lines point from plate 2 toward plate 1.
parsed.rationale: The arrows on the electric field lines point from the positive plate (plate 2) to the negative plate (plate 1), indicating the direction of the electric field.
